names_tesim: Bishop Michael, son of the priest Yaʿqub, son of the priest Gorgios

full_text_tesim: Bishop Michael, son of the priest Yaʿqub, son of the priest Gorgios
Copied in the village Qara (ܩܐܪܐ) by Bishop Michael, son of the priest Yaʿqub, son of the priest Gorgios in the year 1489 AG (=1177/8 CE).
Part 1. Gospel Lectionary; Evangelion (Byzantine rite) (acephalous), ff. 1r–167v
Part 2. Pseudo-Nonnus, Scholia to Gregory of Nazianzus’ First Invective against (fragment), ff. 168–169
